qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Remote Code Execution via Unsafe Code Validation Endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes missing authentication (CWE-306) on three monitor endpoints in src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/monitor.py. This finding is about unsafe exec() of user-supplied code (CWE-94) in the /api/v1/validate/code endpoint in validate.py. Different root cause, different vulnerable function, different endpoint, different file.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory (GHSA-c5cp-vx83-jhqx) describes missing authentication (CWE-306) on three monitor endpoints in src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/monitor.py. The sole qualifying finding (langflow_code_validation_rce) addresses code injection via exec() in the /api/v1/validate/code endpoint (CWE-94, different file, different endpoint, different missing guard). No finding identifies the missing Depends(get_current_active_user) authentication dependency on the monitor endpoints.
evidence: Advisory root cause: missing dependencies=[Depends(get_current_active_user)] on GET /api/v1/monitor/messages, GET /api/v1/monitor/transactions, and DELETE /api/v1/monitor/messages/session/{session_id} in src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/monitor.py

langflow_code_validation_rce targets POST /api/v1/validate/code in src/lfx/src/lfx/custom/validate.py and src/backend/base/langflow/api/v1/validate.py — different endpoint, different file, different root cause (exec() vs missing auth dependency)
